positive: Minimalist circular emblem design featuring a stylized celestial forest: glowing crescent moon cradling three overlapping silhouette trees (birch, oak, weeping willow). The style is ethereal cosmic line art meets sacred geometry. High contrast, utilizing deep midnight blues, emerald greens, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be centered and highly scalable, suitable for a single-color screen print on apparel. The foreground silhouettes are sharp and distinct against a subtle, nebula-filled background with gentle bokeh and crystalline particle effects. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, detailed filigree work, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, signature, logo, text, words, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, low detail, photorealism, painting, messy lines, oversaturated
